title: cyathea escuquensis
intro: Cyathea escuquensis, also known as the Escudo Tree Fern, is a species of tree fern that belongs to the Cyathea genus. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments. The Escudo Tree Fern has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and acting as an antimicrobial agent, which can help in treating conditions like wounds and infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Cyathea escuquensis are often used to make teas or infusions, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties.
